Contact us Advanced Technology Advanced dental technology for precise, effective outcomes. Contact us About Doctor Dr. Rajeshwar Dingra is a distinguished dental professional known for his expertise and dedication to patient care. With qualifications including a BDS and an MDS (PhD), Dr. Dingra has earned recognition for his advanced certifications in Advanced Endodontics, Advanced Implantology. These certifications reflect his proficiency in specialized dental procedures that enhance both oral function. As the founder of Dingra Dental Clinic, Dr. Dingra combines modern dental technology with a patient-centric approach to deliver high-quality dental care. His specialization in Advanced Endodontics ensures precise and effective treatment of complex root canal cases, while his expertise in Advanced Implantology provides dependable solutions for tooth replacement. Dr. Dingra’s commitment to excellence is evident in his attention to detail and continuous pursuit of professional growth. Patients appreciate his compassionate approach and his ability to provide comprehensive dental care that supports both oral health and confidence. At Dingra Dental Clinic, Dr. Rajeshwar Dingra is dedicated to improving smiles and promoting long-term dental well-being through personalized and expert care. Read More About Clinic Dingra Dental Clinic, conveniently located near Palam Apartment in Southwest Bijwasan, New Delhi, 110061, is a trusted dental healthcare facility known for delivering high-quality oral care. The clinic is equipped with modern technology and led by experienced professionals dedicated to maintaining excellent standards in dentistry. Patients can expect a comprehensive range of dental services, including routine check-ups, professional cleanings, restorative treatments, root canal procedures, and advanced dental surgeries. The clinic emphasizes accurate diagnosis, effective treatment planning, and long-term oral health care for every patient. With a patient-centric approach, the clinic ensures a comfortable, hygienic, and welcoming environment for all visitors. Every effort is made to provide a stress-free experience while maintaining the highest standards of sterilization and care. Committed to excellence and personalized dental treatment, Dingra Dental Clinic has become a reliable destination for comprehensive oral healthcare in the New Delhi region. Read More Make an Appointment Book Appointment Now About Doctor Dr. Pooja Ahuja Dingra is a highly skilled BDS Consultant Dental Surgeon known for her expertise in advanced endodontics and smile designing. She holds Certifications of Completion (C/C) in both fields, reflecting her proficiency in handling complex dental procedures and enhancing dental aesthetics. Dr. Dingra plays a key role at Dingra Dental Clinic, where she is dedicated to delivering high-quality, patient-centered dental care. Her clinical approach focuses on precision, comfort, and long-term oral health outcomes. At the clinic, Dr. Dingra utilizes modern dental technology combined with a personalized approach to provide effective treatments. Her expertise includes root canal treatments, restorative dentistry, and cosmetic dental procedures such as smile designing, helping patients achieve healthy and confident smiles. She is known for her meticulous attention to detail, gentle approach, and commitment to maintaining the highest standards of dental care. Patients appreciate her ability to clearly explain procedures and ensure a comfortable treatment experience. Dr. Pooja Ahuja Dingra continues to build her reputation as a dedicated dental professional through her continuous learning and commitment to excellence in dentistry.
